title: RWA yield platform Nuva, co-incubated by Animoca, raises $5.2 million in seed funding
message_html: RWA yield platform Nuva, co-incubated by Animoca, raises $5.2 million in seed funding ...
snippet: Nuva is a marketplace for tokenized real-world assets that aims to help users earn yield by connecting issuers and users directly.
